programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Betrayal's Climax

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Parts

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fault

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: With a recent move and tough financial times, the Saunders family is facing a bleak Christmas. When the family finds a bag full of money belonging to two bumbling crooks, things get interesting.

programme.title: Movie: Love at the Christmas Table
programme.desc: Two friends who have spent every Christmas together at the children's table realize they are meant to be together.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Gift
programme.desc: A ten-year-old received a Secret Santa gift that had a huge impact on her life. Now a driven young journalist, she searches for the person who sent her the gift as a child.

programme.title: Movie: Merry In-Laws
programme.desc: A woman says yes to her boyfriend's marriage proposal without knowing that her soon-to-be in-laws are Mr. And Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Movie: Poinsettias for Christmas
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help the family poinsettia farm in the rush before Christmas.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave
programme.desc: When their trailer catches fire, the young husband heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home. The cut window screen points to an intruder, but there is a lack of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed
programme.desc: An apparent suicide turns out to be a much more menacing scenario involving a black widow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Touch of Evil
programme.desc: A dismembered body is dumped on the side of the New Jersey Turnpike and before police realize it, bodies are turning up between two states. A serial killer emerges, targeting Manhattan's gay community.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Charles Manson: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: This episode details the horror of Charles Manson's vicious attacks and explains how he was able to convince his hippie followers to brutally murder innocent strangers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hack Attack
programme.desc: A successful and growing manufacturing company is suddenly hit with a massive computer crash, jeopardizing the future of the company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Bottle for Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news. A gentler Bam takes the lead on a critical next step of the main house build, while Noah creates a Bush Monster Plow to clear heavy snow. Sister Bird makes an unusual gift for Gabe.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Land Giveths and Takeths
programme.desc: As winter winds down, the Browns prepare for a medieval-themed birthday celebration for Baby Eli. Pushing through the pandemic, the Browns complete the main house just before a massive wildfire strikes the mountain.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back to the Future
programme.desc: Months before the fire, the Browns film their daily life locked down on the mountain. And watching and reacting to memorable moments from the show for the first time, the Wolfpack reflects on their adventures in Alaska.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Every Last One
programme.desc: When a devastating wildfire rages on their mountain, the Wolfpack evacuates down mountain. But when given a short window to return to the property, the siblings attempt a final rescue of their livestock and prized animals.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Kilcher Quarantine
programme.desc: As the coronavirus spreads into Alaska and ATLF camera crews are sent home for safety, the Kilcher family self-documents the quarantine and how the COVID-19 crisis is changing life on the homestead.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fire of the Gods
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores places where destruction and creation exist in breathtaking concert, from the legendary Chernobyl nuclear power plant in Ukraine to a Spanish festival that culminates with a citywide inferno.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Every Last One
programme.desc: When a devastating wildfire rages on their mountain, the Wolfpack evacuates down mountain. But when given a short window to return to the property, the siblings attempt a final rescue of their livestock and prized animals.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier
programme.desc: As spring approaches, the Kilchers prepare for a potentially devastating wildfire season. But when COVID-19 threatens the homestead and crews are evacuated, the family must come together and adapt like never before.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Kilcher Quarantine
programme.desc: As the coronavirus spreads into Alaska and ATLF camera crews are sent home for safety, the Kilcher family self-documents the quarantine and how the COVID-19 crisis is changing life on the homestead.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fire of the Gods
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores places where destruction and creation exist in breathtaking concert, from the legendary Chernobyl nuclear power plant in Ukraine to a Spanish festival that culminates with a citywide inferno.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Mckinley, We Have A Problem
programme.desc: Finding their biggest gold nugget of the season is a great sign, but soon enough heavy rain means flooding and despite the danger, the Dakota boys still go out and dive.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Sacrifice & Sabotage
programme.desc: After being rescued from the water, Dustin has to look for a new mine site, but learns the McKinley site may not be a lost cause after all.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Landslide
programme.desc: There's still no sign of bedrock gold, but as the crew starts to question Dustin's leadership, his determination pays off.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Widow Maker
programme.desc: The Dakota boys are dredging to a nugget trap that may have a jackpot of gold. They dredge the width of the creek and bring up more gold than ever.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Gold Strike
programme.desc: The crew cleans up and does a final gold weigh-in for the season. Then Dustin leads them to a new mine site he's had his eye on that proves instantly to have massive gold potential.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: The Raney family kicks off the most ambitious rescue ever, on their own 40 acres. As multiple generations gather to chip in, Marty attempts a dangerous river crossing to get thousands of pounds of gear to the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: One If by River, Two If by Air
programme.desc: An aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies as Marty breaks ground on massive foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin an innovative greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the new sawmill.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Days Are A-Comin'
programme.desc: With only two weeks left to finish their ambitious self-rescue, Marty races to complete the walls of the log cabin. Misty expands the garden and builds a goat shelter, while Matt takes the next generation on a hunt for gold.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Do or Die
programme.desc: In the season finale, Marty struggles to finish the cliff-top cabin. The family must risk another river crossing to get materials across for a final crucial build. Misty and Maciah begin their own dream cabin on the homestead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Popping Popeye
programme.desc: Lisa has a horn growing out of the back of her head and fears that it could be cancer. Victor has a bulbous lump on the middle of his chest. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm. Christian and Jonathan are teenage brothers with matching lumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Record Breaking Lump!
programme.desc: Tim has a massive growth on his back that affects his ability to work and socialize. Daniel has debilitating psoriasis that covers 90% of his body. Gloriana and Yolanda are a mother/daughter duo who have bonded over their bumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Every Rosacea Has Its Thorn
programme.desc: Patrick's nose is covered by huge bumps and he can barely breathe. Aziza and Lauren are friends who bonded over their matching wrist lumps. Joe has a mound in the middle of his forehead that looks like a third eye.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: Twin Peaks
programme.desc: After being sucker-punched, Dexter developed a large mass that protrudes from his jaw. Zaria hopes her son might avoid the multitude of tiny face bumps that seem to run in her family. Tracie and Stacie are twins with matching head bumps.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: The Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer sees a man whose toenails are so long he can tap dance with them, and Dr. Vincent has a complicated case of webbed toes and strange bones. Dr. Haller has a patient with toenails so bad that he uses a hedge clipper to trim them.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: This is Zit
programme.desc: Traci's confidence has been destroyed after years of bullying from the bumps that have plagued her face. Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg. David has a large lump that envelopes his nose.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Before the Pop: 100 Lumps and Counting
programme.desc: Luke has hundreds of lumps on his body that he has been hiding from his in-laws for over nine years. A trio of skin conditions cause Tanisha tremendous stress. John has been avoiding family gatherings since being teased about the huge lump on his neck.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Dangerous Digit
programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer faces a huge challenge with a mass taking over a man's foot, and Dr. Vincent's patient has a massive toe that somehow she's hidden from her boyfriend. Deformed feet will soon prevent Dr. Haller's patient from walking.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Halloween in the ER
programme.desc: A mysterious white dog wanders the hospital halls on Halloween. A neurologist encounters an unconscious motorcyclist on the side of the road. The treatment of a young boy's broken leg turns into an investigation that might reveal child abuse.

programme.desc: Feisty Rebecca has lost 90 pounds and won't let her mom keep her from her dream dress. Plus-size Cassidy has her heart set on one particular Hayley Paige gown. Plus, a glam wedding proves you're never too old to be a princess.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Love at First Flight
programme.desc: Pnina megafan Julianna wants the sexiest dress ever but her fiancé's family are afraid she'll say yes to a dress she'll regret. Plus, jumpsuit enthusiast Randell wants a wedding onesie - too bad Randy and Lisa can't find any.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: To Sell or Not to Sell
programme.desc: Matt surprises Amy with an offer to buy the north side of the farm, but she struggles to meet his deadline. Zach and Tori plan for a low-key Christmas as they adjust to life with baby Lilah, but Matt makes sure Jackson has the full holiday experience.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Boxing Up the Past
programme.desc: Matt is eager to get the farmhouse in order, which leaves Amy stressed out and struggling to pack up 30 years of memories. Zach is up for the challenge of watching Jackson and Lilah alone for the first time, but two kids are a lot harder than one.

programme.desc: Dominique's guests watch the snow fall at her nuptials, while Tyler Ann's guests watch TV. Jessica decorates her venue with cotton balls, while Tonya's event serves up home cooked meals.

programme.desc: Tommy teaches his none gypsy bride her role in gypsy society.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Virgin Gypsy Brides
programme.desc: There is no sex before marriage if you are a gypsy teen. Follow two girls going through different rites of passage under their protective mothers' watch.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: An American Gypsy in Romania
programme.desc: Adopted bride Andrada can't wait to meet her Romanian birth family at her huge Gypsy wedding. But when trouble arises, she travels across the world to keep the dream alive. Inari defies her strict family and reveals a shocking secret plan at her Sweet 16.

programme.title: Movie: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A young boy becomes the target of a class bully after moving to China because of his mother's job. A maintenance man later teaches the boy the secret art of kung fu so the boy can defend himself.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: With the help of District Attorney Harvey Dent and Lieutenant James Gordon, Batman battles a madman known as the Joker who causes terror and mayhem for fun.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXIX

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Johnny Bananas
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome MTV legend Johnny Bananas to witness some 'big betrayals', get into it with 'roommate drama' and check out some folks who are obstacle course 'challenged'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel's Birthday
programme.desc: Rob and Steelo celebrate Chanel's birthday with bad surprieses, send in a carload of insta-clowns, and put her detective skills to the test on some unsolved mysteries.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: T-Pain

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXCI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo try not to say the wrong thing in 'temper triggers', celebrate all the fathers out there with 'dad's weekend', and prove that older isn't always wiser with 'old dumbass'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Josef Newgarden
programme.desc: IndyCar racing champ Josef Newgarden joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to find out what makes a car indy-structible.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXXXIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo test some harebrained plans in 'Cant' Believe That Worked', stumble over some words in 'Vernacular Manslaughter' and hone pee skills in 'Stream Kings'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jay Rock
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome rapper Jay Rock as they expose some "Fakers," check out some people who've been "Slammed Straight," and find out that there's no escaping "Karma Kraze."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XCVI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo talk about going through a 'kidlife crisis,' experiencing retail hell, and the wonderful people known as 'cluccbois.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Christian Yelich

programme.desc: In Cleveland, a young father is executed in his home and his family is terrorized by masked gunmen. Then, in Dallas, an innocent teen is gunned down with an assault rifle, putting detectives on the hunt for a dangerous killer.

programme.title: The First 48: Blood Feud
programme.desc: When two men in Miami are gunned down in a bloody turf war, Detective Douglas must race to catch the killers before the deadly feud claims another life.

programme.title: The First 48: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: In Rochester, a man from a neighboring suburb is found shot to death on a city street.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: It's Electric
programme.desc: The guys pitch whimsical TV show idea to focus groups and then go to the park with their 'daughters' who share unpopular opinions. The loser heads to the spa for an electrifying punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 11
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fraudway
programme.desc: Find out why Sal thought the production designer was tricking him, which Joker loves all things motorized and why Murr started taking piano lessons.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Up Loser's Creek

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Getting Nutty

programme.desc: Chopped Champions Seis Kamimura and Demetrio Zavala try to beat Bobby.

programme.desc: Keith is forced to hand over the Wizard. Josh fights for the helm despite a bad showing. Major engine trouble threatens Wild Bill's season.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Winter's Curse
programme.desc: A massive tidal surge threatens Josh and Monte as they chase their bounty deep into an arctic storm. Wild Bill hopes to get his broken boat off the dock. The rest of the fleet arrives for the start of Opilio.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blackout
programme.desc: A blackout leaves Jake Anderson and the crew of the Saga on a dark ship. Unable to fish, Keith Colburn hopes to recruit Josh Harris to save his business.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The deck is plagued with accidents, and winter season rocks the fleet with swells of 20 feet and winds of 40 knots. The Bering Sea takes a brutal toll on Cornelia Marie, and strategy is critical with crabs on the move in the wheelhouse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captain Conflict
programme.desc: Sig races to offload his tanks before losing half a million dollars in crab. The Bering Sea doubles down on punishment for one Cornelia Marie greenhorn. Tension between co-captains reaches a breaking point in the Wizard's wheelhouse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Baptism by Fire
programme.desc: It's baptism by fire aboard the Northwestern as Mandy takes her first shift in heavy seas. The Wizard crew battles over one crewman who isn't pulling his weight on deck. Caught short on bait gear and battered by high seas, Wild Bill changes his strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Supermoon Storm
programme.desc: A 150 year supermoon storm wreaks havoc on tides, churning undersea currents that rip pots right off their lines. The Coast Guard attempts a rescue mission in the heart of the storm, while Wild Bill faces his worst nightmare as a greenhorn goes overboard.

programme.desc: It's baptism by fire aboard the Northwestern as Mandy takes her first shift in heavy seas. The Wizard crew battles over one crewman who isn't pulling his weight on deck. Caught short on bait gear and battered by high seas, Wild Bill changes his strategy.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Supermoon Storm
programme.desc: A 150 year supermoon storm wreaks havoc on tides, churning undersea currents that rip pots right off their lines. The Coast Guard attempts a rescue mission in the heart of the storm, while Wild Bill faces his worst nightmare as a greenhorn goes overboard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bad Blood
programme.desc: The deck is plagued with accidents, and winter season rocks the fleet with swells of 20 feet and winds of 40 knots. The Bering Sea takes a brutal toll on Cornelia Marie, and strategy is critical with crabs on the move in the wheelhouse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Captain Conflict
programme.desc: Sig races to offload his tanks before losing half a million dollars in crab. The Bering Sea doubles down on punishment for one Cornelia Marie greenhorn. Tension between co-captains reaches a breaking point in the Wizard's wheelhouse.

programme.title: Little Giants: Microzilla
programme.desc: A global expedition to spotlight the astonishing abilities of tiny animals begins in the Mexican desert as Bradley Trevor Greive and Billy Almon track down and test the jaw-dropping, almost supernatural abilities of the giant horned lizard.

programme.title: Little Giants: Winged Warrior
programme.desc: Bradley and Billy are hunting for dragons deep in the rainforests of Thailand. The flying dragon rules the jungle canopy, and the team hope to discover how this lizard's ability to glide has enabled it to dominate its environment for 250 million years.

programme.title: Little Giants: Murderous Mouse
programme.desc: The team scours the Sonoran Desert for North America's mightiest mouse: the carnivorous grasshopper mouse. An impressive vertical leap, size-defying bite force, and bone-shaking howl allow this rodent to transform into a vicious scorpion kiler at night.

programme.title: Little Giants: Eight-legged Nightmare
programme.desc: After a harrowing search in a South African cave, the team tracks down the elusive, spine-chilling tailless whip scorpion. When they test its lethal attributes, they quickly discover that this supreme nocturnal predator is a real life nightmare.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Yangtze
programme.desc: China's Yangtze River is threatened by overfishing, industrial pollution and the loss of iconic monster fish. Jeremy journeys upstream to find out if there are any fish left, and meets the heroes fighting for the future of the river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Ganges
programme.desc: India's mighty Ganges, a river revered by a billion Hindus as a living goddess, is in trouble. Jeremy Wade is on a 1,500-mile mission to investigate the problems first hand and discover what is being done to save this holy river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Mississippi
programme.desc: The mighty Mississippi is threatened on several fronts: from alien invaders pushing out iconic native fish, to vast blooms of green algae strangling life from the river. Jeremy meets scientists, fishermen and leaders fighting to save the river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Zambezi
programme.desc: Wild and unnavigable, Africa's Zambezi boasts the world's mightiest waterfall, heart-pounding rapids and man-eating crocs. From the upper reaches in Zambia to the delta in Mozambique, Jeremy investigates the threats to this mighty river.

programme.title: River Monsters: Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Paran River in the remote corner of Argentina to investigate the death of a young girl. This creature is not armed with bone crunching jaws or razor sharp teeth, but a razor-sharp blade tipped with tissue destroying venom.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is being terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims. The only clue they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it's left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: River Monsters: Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy journeys to Nepal where rumours of a deadly man-eating catfish have surfaced, and tries to determine if the Goonch has returned, or if a new monster is on the loose.

programme.title: River Monsters: Flesh Ripper
programme.desc: New Zealand's freshwaters have been a safe place for swimmers, yet as Jeremy finds out, its remote rivers and deep lakes provide refuge for an ancient and slippery predator that has stayed hidden for more than a century.

programme.title: Movie: A Madea Christmas
programme.desc: Madea gets roped into helping a friend surprise her daughter with a visit to the country over the holidays. Secrets are revealed and relationships are tested as Christmas approaches.

programme.desc: An awards show celebrating the biggest names in the hip-hop music industry and community.

programme.title: Martin: You've Got a Friend

programme.title: Below Deck: Captain Lee's Yachtrageous Moments 2020
programme.desc: Cameras follow crewmembers living and working aboard a yacht.

programme.title: Below Deck: Kate Goes to Church
programme.desc: During their night off Jesus and Kate get to know each other while Chris Brown makes a pass at Brianna. Nico deals with the stress of the boat on the 3-month anniversary of the passing of his brother. Matt makes a move on Brianna.

programme.title: Below Deck: Cool Beans
programme.desc: Captain Lee makes a decision regarding the crew's re-configuration which rocks the team to its core. Matt's date with Brianna has an unexpected outcome when they mistakenly arrive at a nude beach. Jen grows weary with the unfair treatment.

programme.title: Below Deck: 100 Feet From Catastrophe
programme.desc: Nico is pushed to his breaking point under the leadership of boson EJ. Matt continues to unravel after his date with Brianna which causes problems for Kate. Captain Lee makes a staffing decision. Jen feels under-appreciated in her department.

programme.title: Below Deck: Blindsided
programme.desc: Leigh Anne Tuohy, the inspiration for Sandra Bullock's character in the Blindside, and her friends prove to be a challenge for Matt's culinary skills. Nico settles into life as the number two on deck, but questions if he has longevity.

programme.title: Below Deck: Under Cover Boss
programme.desc: Nico and Brianna grow closer despite Nico's girlfriend back in Chicago. Unexpected news sends Matt into an alcohol fueled day off. Baker takes the offensive in her friendship with EJ. Kate challenges Jen and Brianna to a stewardess speed test.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hot Mess Express
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Nico and Matt have their hands full when eight big personalities from Texas come on board. Matt attempts to step up his cooking game. Bruno decides to help the interior, only to discover how unorganized they are.

programme.title: Below Deck: King Come-On-I-Wanna-Lay-Ya
programme.desc: An accident puts Nico in jeopardy of finishing out the rest of the charter season. Kate is forced to leave her stews behind as she attempts to entertain the guests who are none too pleased to be land locked. Without Kate on board, old rivalries resume.

programme.title: Below Deck: Only Doing It for the Money
programme.desc: Captain Lee has a special guest come aboard and the crew gets to see a different side to their leader. A familiar face from the past surprises the crew and immediately has eyes for Jen. An all-female charter proves to be a handful.

programme.title: Below Deck: You Don't Mess With the Primary
programme.desc: Captain Lee tests Matt as he removes Bruno from the galley and joins the women for dinner. Jen feels defeated as her and Kate's working relationship deteriorates. Kyle and Jen grow closer, but Kyle has ulterior motives.

programme.title: Below Deck: The One Where Jen Loses Her Mind
programme.desc: Timothy Sykes is back and once again can't live without his WiFi. Kate and Captain Lee know the expectations that are required for a guest of this magnitude and they are feeling the pressure. Jen is under intense scrutiny.

programme.title: Below Deck: The Champagne Campaign
programme.desc: It's the final night of the charter season and tensions within the crew are running high. All departments are working overtime as Timothy Sykes micromanages the crew to execute the perfect surprise for his guests. Jen attempts to be on her best behavior.

programme.desc: A wife and mother seeks attention outside her marriage and triggers a deadly chain of events.

programme.desc: A taboo romance between a mother and her daughter's ex-boyfriend becomes the focus of police when two dead bodies are discovered.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Return of the Moon Bugs
programme.desc: Apollo 12 astronauts bring back something alive from the moon and NASA tracks an asteroid heading towards Earth but makes a shocking discovery: it's not an asteroid, but an object that's artificial in nature.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: NASA footage and interviews with the astronauts and scientists reveal some of the strange cases NASA has encountered.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Sun's Evil Twin

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Planet of the Metal Aliens
programme.desc: After a strange discovery confirms that life is possible on its surface, scientists begin to investigate if a nearby exoplanet could be home to an alien civilization.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nostradamus

programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: How It's Made: Canvas Wall Tents; Peace Pipes; Shredded Wheat Cereal; Cannons
programme.desc: Take a look at how canvas tents, peace pipes, Shredded Wheat and cannons are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: 3D Signs, Hardwood Floors, Corrugated Polyethylene Pipe, Mattresses
programme.desc: Featuring the production explanation of 3D commercial signs, hardwood floors, corrugated polyethylene pipe and mattresses.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Trailing the Devil
programme.desc: A nightmare wreaks havoc on the village of Armada, Michigan when 14-year-old April Millsap is found murdered on the community's most popular bike trail. Very little evidence leaves investigators running down clues to bring this monster to justice.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Let Go
programme.desc: A woman believes she may finally be free of her possessive ex-boyfriend, but months later, now in a new relationship, she can't help but feel she's being watched. The stalker's true identity is not at all what she imagined.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Shelia Dates and her daughter Regina are more than blood relatives: they're best friends and roommates too. But one morning, their lives are irrevocably changed the moment two unexpected guests appear at their doorstep.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Rumors in the Halls
programme.desc: Suspicion lands close to home when 17-year-old prom queen Aquilla Flood is found dead in her bedroom. Her family faces tough questions, while Aquilla's friends point detectives to three young men.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Truth, Lies and Redemption
programme.desc: In 1988, a man is released from jail after a judge deems his murder confession false. For 25 years, a family's hope for justice fades, as the killer walks the streets. One tenacious detective refuses to let this cold case go.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Dug a Hole and Said a Prayer
programme.desc: When police question a man in the disappearance of his pregnant ex-girlfriend and her young son, they discover he has a terrifying capacity for violence.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath: I Could Hear Her Calling My Name
programme.desc: A young girl disappears after school. Her last known steps are caught on surveillance cameras, which led investigators to two dark minds who carried out one of the most sinister, depraved crimes imaginable.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: High School Revenge
programme.desc: A woman and her daughter are kidnapped and held hostage by a man exacting revenge from his high school days.

programme.title: Secrets of the Morgue: Wolf at the Door
programme.desc: A wealthy woman disappears from her upscale Ohio retirement village. Days later, her body is found in the trunk of her abandoned car.

programme.title: Dateline: The Informant
programme.desc: A young woman’s chilling story about a girl’s abduction and murder helps re-open a case that has haunted a New York town for decades.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery on Sunrise Drive
programme.desc: A successful real estate developer is killed with a car bomb, a mystery that takes nearly two decades to solve.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery on Sunrise Drive
programme.desc: A successful real estate developer is killed with a car bomb, a mystery that takes nearly two decades to solve.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Webcam of Lies
programme.desc: When a hopeful 12-year-old singer looks for fame online using her webcam, she gathers many admirers, and soon finds a boy who flatters her so much she falls for him. But her dreams become her worst nightmare when a shocking photo is shared online.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Partners in Crime
programme.desc: Firefighter Sam Dreher and his wife Danielle are the perfect couple. But after their hopes of happiness are dashed, their marriage fails. When Sam falls in love with another woman, his affair triggers a chain of events that spirals out of control.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Catfished
programme.desc: A 28-year-old is catfished by an online prankster. Incensed, he sets his target on the only person he can think of -- the girl in the pictures.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Candyman
programme.desc: Candy Williams has recently moved to the idyllic beach town of Gulfport, Florida. When she a meets handsome stranger at the beach, she thinks life can't get any better. But a fantasy romance becomes a real life horror story as his past comes to life.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A pedestrian check turns deadly when a cop is gunned down on a midnight patrol. The attacker flees with the officer's squad car...and her weapon. The stakes are higher than ever as investigators try to capture the person who killed one of their own.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: The Axe Man Cometh
programme.desc: A kind-hearted woman is found slain in her bed; seems to be a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Season's Grievings
programme.desc: After a night at karaoke, a pretty nurse vanishes into the frigid Wisconsin winter. Security footage reveals the woman left with a mystery man in a dark jacket. What detectives uncover is the coldest of crimes and a monstrous end to a beautiful life.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A sniper shooting on an Alaskan highway leaves a young man dead and a community running scared. As one family grieves, another becomes hell-bent on revenge as they formulate an audacious plot.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Real Braveheart
programme.desc: William Wallace is the most famous Scot in history. In 1296, Scotland is invaded by English King Edward I and only one man is prepared to stand in his way.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Vlad's Impalers
programme.desc: Vlad the Impaler, the inspiration for the fictional character of Dracula, was one of the most ruthless and brutal rulers in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Sacred Band of Thebes
programme.desc: In 371 B.C., ancient Greek superpower the Spartan army confronts the three hundred warriors of the Sacred Band of Thebes.

programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: M.A.D. WORLD: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades two global superpowers face off, poised for swift and terrible action, threatening to annihilate one another, with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle - and at times, a deadly game. It is the Cold War.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin
programme.desc: His neighbours saw a devout family man. The last thing his victims saw was a shotgun aimed at their heads. If there's an outlaw who was born to kill its Deacon Jim Miller, the Bible-thumping psycho-killer.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big-Time Brother Rebuild in Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, RI. Their real estate agent finds the perfect lakefront fixer-upper, but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into many structural issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: A couple customizes an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Lakefront Overhaul
programme.desc: A couple with renovation know-how is looking for a fixer-upper lake house near Weiss Lake in Alabama.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Northeast Texas Turnaround
programme.desc: A Minnesota couple searches for a vacation home in Texas that reminds them of their home state. Their agent helps them find a lakefront property in northeast Texas that may be their dream home, but its current state requires quite a bit of TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Bringing Down the Walls
programme.desc: Brother-and-sister duo Michelle and David Jaime take on a massive amount of walls that have closed off a photography couple's dream house.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A couple reaches a standstill during demolition, so David and Michelle come to the rescue to save their remodel.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Ohana New Kitchen
programme.desc: Michelle and David Jaime rearrange a whole house for a growing family in need of a new kitchen, dining room and master bedroom.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Halfway House
programme.desc: Michelle and David are challenged to fix a previous remodel that has left half of a home stuck in the 1980s.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: Hawaiian Shirt Renovation
programme.desc: Daniel, Kahina and their new baby live in a charming house built in 1931, but the miniscule master closet is being overrun by Daniel's Hawaiian shirt collection.

programme.title: Aloha Builds: A Touch of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple with an unfinished basement apartment that they would like to rent out, call in David and Michelle Jaime to finish off the work. The siblings bring in natural wood tones and durable kitchen finishes, adding their signature Hawaiian touch.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Relocation Renovation
programme.desc: A NYC couple looks to escape the hustle and bustle of the city and purchases a fixer-upper only a short ferry ride away on the Jersey Shore. But once renovations begin, they discover so many problems that they wonder if they might be in over their heads.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Washington Coast Charmer
programme.desc: A couple that's looking for a forever home for their family of four finds a charming house that needs a major upgrade in Grays Harbor County, WA.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stacked
programme.desc: With layers upon layers stacked with flavour and ingredients, these favorite dishes seem too good to be true. Wolfgang Puck gushes about an unimaginable seafood platter at Cassia in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Stretchy Pants Required
programme.desc: America's best dishes just might burst your buttons. Anne Burrell faces off against a gut-busting club sandwich from Little Goat Diner in Chicago while Antonia Lofaso ventures to the heart of Los Angeles for heavy-hitting Korean barbecue at Park's BBQ.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Fried and Gone to Heaven
programme.desc: Some fried food is so crispy, so crunchy and so incredible that you feel like you've died and gone to heaven. Jeff Mauro heads to Proxi in Chicago for a food frenzy with the most-unique version of street corn ever imagined. Simon Majumdar takes his taste.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bangkok: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thailand, has so many culinary treasures, it deserves a second trip! From steamed whole bass to massaman curry, Andrew highlights the city's exotic flavors and meals that are meant to be shared.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Austin
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the one-of-a-kind tastes of Austin, Texas, a city known for 'keeping things weird.' This city excels at meaty classics like barbecue brisket, Texas chili and 10-gallon-hat-sized chicken fried steak.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bogota
programme.desc: Andrew explores the sky-high flavors of Bogota, Colombia. This mountaintop city keeps warm with hearty potato soup, whole-roasted stuffed pork, egg filled arepas, their unique take on the tamale and cheesy hot chocolate.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Providence, Rhode Island
programme.desc: Adam visits Providence, Rhode Island for a unique grilled pizza and for the infamous Triple Murder Burger. Adam's journey concludes with him coaching a rugby player through 15 fully loaded hot wieners in 45 minutes.

programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: A Shoe Addict's Christmas
programme.desc: A self-professed 'Christmas hater' is locked in a department store on Christmas Eve. There, she meets a woman who claims to be her 'guardian angel' and shares with her three Christmas ghosts.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Plaza
programme.desc: A historian is hired to create a Christmas display at the Plaza. While working, she learns that fate has prevailed and teamed her up with a handsome decorator to help bring the display, and their romance, to life.

programme.title: Movie: Jingle Bell Bride
programme.desc: A wedding planner heads off to Alaska to source a rare flower for a bride. While there, she is charmed by a handsome botanist who shows her what the town has to offer for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Secret
programme.desc: A woman has big hopes for her town's big holiday adventure, until she meets the man behind the plan.

programme.title: The Office: E-Mail Surveillance
programme.desc: The employees at Dunder Mifflin are upset when Michael starts monitoring their emails. Meanwhile, Pam suspects Dwight and Angela are having an affair. Michael later shows up uninvited at Jim's barbecue and sings karaoke.

programme.title: The Office: Booze Cruise
programme.desc: When Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin crew on a motivational harbour cruise aboard a party boat on Lake Wallenpaupack, things get out of hand and Michael ends up in the brig. Meanwhile, Jim is bummed when Roy and Pam finally set a wedding date.

programme.title: The Office: The Injury
programme.desc: Michael demands attention from the entire Dunder Mifflin office after he has a freak accident with his George Foreman grill and Dwight begins behaving strangely following a minor car crash.

programme.title: The Office: The Secret
programme.desc: Jim is worried that Michael is going to tell the others that he likes Pam so he has to unfortunately go along with being his best friend.

programme.title: The Office: The Carpet
programme.desc: When someone soils the carpet in Michael's office, Michael begins to question his popularity with his staff. He temporarily takes Jim's desk in the bullpen in order to bond with his troops, and initiates a sales contest to boost morale.

programme.title: The Office: Boys and Girls
programme.desc: When Jan visits the office to conduct a 'women in the workplace' seminar with the female Dunder Mifflin employees, Michael takes the guys down to the warehouse for some 'male bonding.'

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Candidate
programme.desc: Johnny contemplates running for Town Council. David and Stevie look for love in all the wrong places while Alexis comes to terms with single life.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Milk Money
programme.desc: Alexis accidentally gets Johnny into the raw milk business. Moira tries to connect with the townsfolk. And David gives style advice to the competition without fully considering the consequences.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Moira's Nudes
programme.desc: Moira worries that salacious photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign. Johnny swallows his pride to ask for financial help. Alexis becomes gainfully and surprisingly employed.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Ronnie's Party
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira, on the campaign trail, meet with a key demographic. Meanwhile, Alexis struggles in her new job and David offers awkward emotional support to his boss' 14-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Motel Guest
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira have to deal with a surprise motel guest while Alexis and David go apartment hunting.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Lawn Signs
programme.desc: Moira's campaign takes a turn when some of her lawn signs mysteriously disappear. David and Alexis must work together to get David's boss out of legal trouble.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Remembering RBG: A Nation Ugly Cries
programme.desc: Desi Lydic celebrates the legacy of iconic Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg while grappling with her passing in a show featuring interviews about the countless lives she touched.

programme.title: South Park: Eek, a Penis!
programme.desc: While Ms. Garrison is off trying to find a way to become the man he was always intended to be, Cartman is put in charge of the classroom.

programme.title: South Park: Good Times With Weapons
programme.desc: The boys are transformed into Japanese Warriors after they trick a vendor and buy martial arts weapons at a local flea market.

programme.title: South Park: Follow That Egg
programme.desc: After Mrs. Garrison realizes that she still has feelings for Mr. Slave, she finds out that Mr. Slave has moved on and found a man he will marry as soon as the same-sex bill passes. She decides to lead the fight against gay marriage to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Le Petit Tourette
programme.desc: Cartman discovers the joys of having Tourette's syndrome. Drunk with the power of saying whatever he wants without getting in trouble for it, he lines up National TV Coverage to take advantage of his new life with no filters.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs
programme.desc: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own. They convince Butters to take credit for the filth that they have written, but become jealous when he is hailed as a literary genius.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: South Park: Marjorine
programme.desc: The boys are on a secret mission to find out exactly what happens behind closed doors when the fourth grade girls have a sleepover. The plan is simple: fake Butters' death, resurrect him as a girl, and infiltrate this age-old feminine tradition.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-School
programme.desc: Trent Boyett, the kid who took the fall for the boys five years ago is getting out of Juvie, and his first order of business is revenge. Fearful for their lives, Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny hire sixth graders and Stan's sister as bodyguards.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: BoJack Horseman: Yesterdayland
programme.desc: A women who's been in a coma for 30 years doesn’t know who Bojack is.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Meet N' Greet

programme.title: The Office: Michael's Birthday
programme.desc: In celebration of his birthday, Michael takes the Dunder Mifflin gang ice skating while Kevin nervously waits for some medical test results.

programme.title: The Office: Drug Testing
programme.desc: When Dwight finds half a joint in the parking lot, he launches a full investigation, prompting Michael to ask for an unusual favour. Elsewhere, Pam playfully issues a challenge to Jim and he does his best to follow through with it.

programme.title: The Office: Conflict Resolution
programme.desc: When Michael takes over conflict resolution duties from HR, chaos ensues at Dunder Mifflin.

programme.title: The Office: Casino Night
programme.desc: Michael and the Dunder Mifflin crew hold a Casino Night for charity in their warehouse and take some big gambles.

programme.title: The Office: Gay Witch Hunt
programme.desc: When Michael unintentionally outs a gay employee, he stumbles through a sensitivity mine-field.

programme.title: The Office: The Convention
programme.desc: After meeting Jan in Philadelphia for the annual Northeastern Mid-Market Office Supply Convention, Michael enlists Dwight's help in organizing a party in his room for fellow conventioneers. Meanwhile, Ryan and Kelly join friends out on a double date.

programme.title: The Office: The Coup
programme.desc: After Jan busts Michael for telling the employees they can watch movies instead of working on Mondays, Angela pushes Dwight to make a play for Michael's job. In the meantime, Pam surfs the internet and Jim plays video games.

programme.title: The Office: Grief Counseling
programme.desc: After learning that his old boss, the former regional manager, has died, Michael attempts to guide the Dunder Mifflin staff through their grief as he searches for the right way to honour the company man.

programme.title: The Office: Initiation
programme.desc: New full-time employee Ryan anxiously accompanies Dwight on his first sales call, but is taken aback by the odd series of challenges Dunder Miffin's top salesman puts him through along the way, including a sidetrip to the Schrute family beet farm.

programme.title: The Office: Diwali
programme.desc: Michael encourages the entire Scranton branch to support Kelly and attend a local celebration of Diwali, the Hindu Festival of Lights. As Ryan nervously faces Kelly's family at the event, Michael, his new girlfriend and the staff sample Indian cuisine.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Closing
programme.desc: When Jan tells Michael that the Scranton Branch will be shutting down, Michael strives to keep his staff's spirits up. Meanwhile, everyone privately begins to envision how their lives will change in the aftermath.

programme.title: The Office: The Merger
programme.desc: The Scranton branch and the Stamford branch of Dunder-Mifflin are merged, bringing old friends Jim and Pam back together after months apart. Michael and Dwight and the other employees deal with the changes.

programme.title: The Office: The Convict
programme.desc: Michael tries to be supportive after he learns that a new employee is an ex-convict.

programme.title: The Office: Back From Vacation
programme.desc: Still in vacation mode after his trip to Jamaica, Michael tries to hang on to his relaxed island vibe despite a wave of office hassles. It all becomes too much when an e-mail containing a racy vacation photo is forwarded around the office.

programme.title: The Office: Halloween
programme.desc: Corporate forces Michael to fire someone, putting a damper on the Halloween festivities at Dunder-Mifflin. Jim and Pam put Dwight's resume on job-searching websites, and Jim considers applying for a better job.

programme.title: Movie: Poinsettias for Christmas
programme.desc: A woman returns home to help the family poinsettia farm in the rush before Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Grounded for Christmas
programme.desc: When a winter storm grounds flights, a young woman invites a fellow pilot to stay at her parent's home for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: A Crafty Christmas Romance
programme.desc: The owner of a craft and hobby store discovers an old copy of 'A Christmas Carol' among donations. In the book is a letter to Santa from 70 years ago and a valuable coin, so she sets out to find the owner with the help of the man who donated it.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Unwrapped
programme.desc: An ambitious yet pragmatic reporter learns the true meaning of Christmas when she investigates a millionaire who insists that all the gifts that arrive on Christmas Day in their town are from Santa.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in the City

programme.title: Movie: Hometown Christmas
programme.desc: A woman plans to save her town's nativity tradition when she returns to her small home town.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas on Ice
programme.desc: A former champion figure skater, who runs the city's outdoor skating rink, falls in love with an unlikely benefactor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Best Foot Forward
programme.desc: A young woman goes missing, but will anyone notice? A business tycoon caught in a scandal he works over-time not to expose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: A License to Kill
programme.desc: For nearly two decades, a physician-turned-murderer left a trail of death and mayhem across two continents.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: You're Next
programme.desc: Suspicious illnesses and deaths followed this once-trusted physician-turned-killer from hospital to hospital for nearly two decades and across two continents.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: Bind, Torture, Kill
programme.desc: Wichita residents live in fear that they will be a killer's next victim.

programme.title: Very Scary People: BTK: The Taunting
programme.desc: For years the BTK killer plays a cat and mouse game with law enforcement and the media taunting them as he seeks the attention he craves.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made
programme.desc: A look at the dealmakers and hangers-on surrounding convicted serial killer Aileen Wuornos known as ''America's first female serial killer.'

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Legend of Porcupine Creek
programme.desc: Parker Schnabel, Dave Turin and Fred Hurt reveal their gold mining origins and how a small remote corner of Southeast Alaska changed their destinies.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: As gold prices spike to record highs and the cost of fuel plummets, Parker, Rick and Tony race to take advantage of the perfect conditions. But after the worldwide lockdown delayed the start of the season, there's less time than ever to cash in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Parker, Rick and Tony start gold season late due to worldwide lockdown. And while gold prices are at a record high and fuel prices low, the delayed start means there's less time to cash in.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Promised Land
programme.desc: Parker expands to a second cut and puts his trust in a rookie foreman. Tony battles the cursed cut. Rick fires up his plant on rich ground. Greenhorn Fred Lewis calls in a mining legend. The miners reveal their secrets for striking it rich gold mining.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Legend of Dozer Dave
programme.desc: From the Yukon to South America, Dave Turin had been at Todd's side helping him mine millions of dollars of gold, until a shocking bare-knuckle fistfight explosively led to Dave quitting. This is Dave's rollercoaster story over seven seasons.

programme.title: Everest: The First Ascent

programme.title: Curiosity
programme.desc: Researchers see if methane bubbles, rogue waves or lightning could be responsible for Bermuda Triangle mysteries.

programme.title: Major League Fishing: 2020 World Championship: Elimination Round Group B

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs Cali Pt 1
