programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: Budding entrepreneurs are given the chance to make their business dreams come true and become successful or even wealthy. But the entrepreneurs must first try to convince five tough, multi-millionaire tycoons to fund their ideas.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Mission: Relative Chaos
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne and Bobby visit their crazy, chaotic extended family. Bobby fits in great but Ronnie Anne struggles with the smothering nature of their relatives. Little do they know, their mother has a secret motive.

programme.title: The Loud House: Band Together/ Blinded by Science
programme.desc: Luna has to decide between playing in a band with her friends or playing with professionals. After searching for her next big scientific breakthrough, Lisa discovers Flip is a marvel of modern science.

programme.title: The Loud House: Good Sports/ Geri-Antics
programme.desc: Lynn finds an unexpected TV sports watching buddy in the family's next-door neighbor, Mr. Grouse. When Lisa realizes that Pop Pop won't be around forever, she turns to science to ensure his longevity.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tricked!
programme.desc: For Halloween, Lincoln and Clyde have scoped out a fancy neighborhood to make their dreams of scoring full size candy bars a reality.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tails of Woe/ The Last Loud on Earth
programme.desc: The gang suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend, is responsible for Stella's missing music box. Then, after watching zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln assume an empty Loud house is the result of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Ghosted!
programme.desc: Lori gets help from Lincoln and Clyde to banish a ghost that's haunting her, but Fairway's golf team starts struggling so she has to bring it back.

programme.title: Nickelodeon's Unfiltered: Happy Slime-o-Ween!
programme.desc: This one is all tricks and no treats.

programme.title: Group Chat With Jayden and Brent: Halloween Sliming for Apples
programme.desc: Jayden Bartels and Brent Rivera throw candy corn, turn into mummies, and bob for slimy apples with special guests, Hubie Halloween stars Lilimar and Paris Berelc. Adam Sandler and Kenan Thompson drop in for a special Halloween message.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Coupon/ Out of the Picture
programme.desc: Patrick has a coupon for free ice cream, but he'll have to get to the store if he wants to use it. Mr. Krabs buys Squidward's art, but to make a profit on his purchase he'll have to get the artist out of the picture.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where the Monkey Gets Away
programme.desc: After agreeing to baby-sit Marcel, a distracted Rachel loses him and calls animal control.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Evil Orthodontist
programme.desc: Rachel may be falling for her ex-fiancé Barry, an orthodontist; Chandler has girl trouble.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Fake Monica
programme.desc: Monica's credit card is stolen, and along with Phoebe and Rachel, she decides to catch the person who stole it. The thief turns out to be so charming and inspiring that Monica decides to become friends with her instead of turning her over to the police.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Ick Factor
programme.desc: Monica dates a college boy who thinks she is his age, but she is the one who is surprised.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Birth
programme.desc: As Carol begins labour, Ross and Susan clash over responsibilities; Monica gets emotional.

programme.title: Mom: Puzzle Club and a Closet Party
programme.desc: Christy and Wendy help Jill clean out her closet, which turns out to be a bigger job than expected, and Bonnie, Marjorie and Tammy take up a new hobby.

programme.title: Mom: Jell-O Shots and the Truth About Santa
programme.desc: Bonnie pushes Christy to mend her relationship with Violet, and Adam prepares for the grand opening of his bar.

programme.title: Mom: Pork Loin and a Beat-up Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Christy competes with her classmates for a prestigious internship, and Bonnie babysits Tammy following her oral surgery.

programme.title: Mom: Flamingos and a Dance-Based Exercise Class
programme.desc: Bonnie and the ladies help Tammy prepare for her first date since getting out of prison. Also, in order to take the edge off, Christy revisits one of her old vices.

programme.title: Full House: Divorce Court
programme.desc: Jesse challenges Danny and Joey to a foot race with the winner choosing the costumes.

programme.title: Full House: Joey and Stacey and Oh Yeah Jesse
programme.desc: Joey's girlfriend thinks that Jesse is too bossy towards Joey; Comet chews up the house.

programme.title: Full House: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: When D.J. decides to baby-sit so she can earn money for a phone, she has some problems.

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: Alvin, Simon and Theodore are under their cousin Toby's care. Upon returning to school, they are tasked with winning a music competition whose cash prize will save the school's music department. They find competition in the form of the Chipettes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Dogs / The Wreck of Mauna Loa
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs decides to start selling hot dogs instead of Krabby Patties.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Algae's Always Greener/ Spongeguard on Duty
programme.desc: Plankton has a new invention that allows him to switch lives with Mr. Krabs. He is so excited because once he has Mr. Krabs' life, he will also have the Krabby Patty secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Golden Opportunity
programme.desc: Nate is reunited with his do-gooder parents, who offer him a compelling and difficult choice.

programme.title: Movie: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria attempt to leave Madagascar but wind up landing in Africa. Alex meets his family but struggles to communicate with them due to his easy life in the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Movie: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: When the secret recipe for krabby patties goes missing, SpongeBob and the gang venture onto dry land to get it back. The scent leads them to a pirate with a magic book, and the ocean-dwellers must transform themselves into superheroes to take him down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanitation Insanity/ Bunny Hunt
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Banned From Bikini Bottom/ Stanley S. Squarepants
programme.desc: Miss Priss has Krabby Patties banned from Bikini Bottom; SpongeBob's cousin visits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Splinter/ Slide Whistle Stooges
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally gets a splinter, but he's afraid Mr. Krabs will send him home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Slammer/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: When Plankton breaks the law, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Grill Is Gone/ the Night Patty
programme.desc: When a gang of kids steals the Krusty Krab's grill, SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs go to extreme lengths to win it back. SpongeBob helps out the Krusty Krab's night shift crew, but the customers crave something creepier than usual.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion: Snow Job
programme.desc: A home invasion and an ensuing fight results in a man being shot. Detectives find one clue, a footprint left in the snow. Now with the sun rising, they need to act fast, before their only lead melts away.

programme.title: Dead of Winter: The Donner Party
programme.desc: A story of weather’s most-infamous tale. What starts as a call to the West quickly turns to a deadly journey for three families and their compatriots on a quest for the American dream.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Tale of Two Mothers
programme.desc: Police body cam footage captures the rescue of a mother and her four young children from Tropical Storm Imelda near Houston.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter: Texas Miracles and Christmas Tragedy
programme.desc: During halftime of a Cowboys-Eagles football game, a Dallas man heads out to get a pizza just as an EF-3 tornado barrels through the city.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Downpour Disaster
programme.desc: Jakarta, Indonesia is pushed beyond its limits when pounded by 15 inches of rain for over twelve hours. A crane collapses on an apartment building garage when a dangerous wind storm sweeps through the Dallas Metroplex.

programme.title: American Supernatural: Devil's Gate Dam
programme.desc: Pasadena is known to have beautiful weather and is also known for its Devil’s Gate Dam, where strange things happen with no explanation.

programme.title: American Supernatural: Voodoo Hurricane
programme.desc: In the early 1900's, after Voodoo Priestess Julia Brown died, the town of Frenier, Louisiana was no more. It is said that she brings death and destruction to the town still to this day.

programme.title: American Supernatural: Wicked Witch of Winter
programme.desc: In the late 17th century in Leonardtown, Maryland, accused witch Moll Dyer was burned out of her home during a deadly freeze. Legend says she froze to death after cursing the town and until price is paid for her murder, she will continue to seek revenge.

programme.title: American Supernatural: Augusta's Tornado Talisman
programme.desc: Legend has it that in that 1800s, a Greek portico pillar in the center of Augusta, Georgia, was the only thing that was left behind after a tornado destroyed the town's market. It is said that whoever tries to remove the pillar will be cursed.

programme.title: American Supernatural: Maine's Ghost on Catherine Hill
programme.desc: Legend has it that the ghost of Catherine haunts a road called Black Woods in Coastal Maine. On foggy nights, Catherine stalks this area looking for her true love, her head and a ride back to town.

programme.title: American Supernatural: Florida's Dead Zone
programme.desc: In Florida, during the 1800's, a landowner enlisted help from a Catholic Priest to assist him in selling plots to colonists. These colonists had no idea that upon arrival, they would be doomed from the start.

programme.title: American Supernatural: Haunted Hurricane Island
programme.desc: In the early 1800’s a young man wearing a long gray coat rushed home to see his true love on Pawley’s Island, South Carolina. He perished in the pluff mud while attempting to cross at high tide.

programme.title: American Supernatural: The Curse of Bodie
programme.desc: Bodie is an 1800's deserted ghost town that was named after a miner that was left to die in a blizzard before claiming gold that belonged to him.

programme.title: Hoarders: BG and Lee/ Chris
programme.desc: BG and Lee have filled their million-dollar Victorian home with hoards of stuff. Chris has filled his house and eight storage units with worthless junk that he gets for free.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Beverly/ Megan
programme.desc: Beverly's home is filled with TV's, recorders, and boxes and stacks of video cassettes. Megan is living in her hoarded, mouse-infested home with a one-week-old baby and her two older children.

programme.title: Hoarders: Maggie and Ann
programme.desc: Maggie's home is so packed with her shopping addiction that her granddaughter was forced to sleep on top of piles and shower outside with a garden hose.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant wields an unlikely weapon, and pays the ultimate price; a judge chases down two escaping defendants; a convicted murderer's smile in court could put him in prison for the rest of his life; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A judge and a defense attorney bring a heated argument to fisticuffs; a woman charged with contempt makes a leap at the judge; a murder suspect pleads with the family of the victim and gets nowhere; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A defendant becomes a one-man army when he takes on a team of court officers; the brother of a murder victim tries to get revenge in court; a defendant takes aim at a judge with a most unusual potential weapon; and more.

programme.title: Movie: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: A CIA analyst inadvertently uncovers information on a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the U.S. economy. His life and marriage are on the line when he is sent to Moscow to continue his investigation and encounters the man at the centre of the plot.

programme.title: Movie: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: An amnesiac is rescued at sea by the crew of an Italian fishing boat. Nearly dead, he carries nothing but the bullets in his back and the bank account number embedded in his hip. He must try to piece together his mysterious past while eluding assassins.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fraudway
programme.desc: Find out why Sal thought the production designer was tricking him, which Joker loves all things motorized and why Murr started taking piano lessons.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a black thumb, what challenges the guys like so much they play when the cameras are off, and how long it took to zombie-fry the undead in Sal's sewer punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Good Ingredients
programme.desc: Ina Garten shares recipes that use her favourite good ingredients starting with good chocolate in her chocolate pecan meringue torte. Next, good maple syrup and lemon are turned into sublime side dishes including maple-roasted acorn squash.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: A Picture Worth Eating
programme.desc: Valerie invites photographer Brian Bowen Smith over for a menu inspired by his favorite ingredient, tequila. Tequila lime chicken wings, chayote slaw, chile lime party mix, a mango tart and mango tequila sunrise are served.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Stand-In Daughter
programme.desc: Ree Drummond makes dinner in miniature for a fun get-together with her niece. She prepares all of niece Halle's favorites, like adorable Bacon Cheeseburger Bites with little Loaded Crash Hots and charming Waldorf Salad Skewers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Care Package 101
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shares the fundamentals of creating care packages while putting one together for Alex. Lemon raspberry pound cake, snickerdoodles, brown butter granola clusters, strawberry fruit roll-ups and custom-made hot chocolate mix gets wrapped up.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Nothing But The Best
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has a line-up of the best bits of food with a stuffed pizza crust and arrabiata sauce, orange blueberry muffin tops, 'a little fruit with my crisp' and crispy chicken skins for a CLT salad with simple ranch dressing.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sunday at Chuck and Nan's
programme.desc: The whole family gathers in town for Sunday lunch at Ree's in-law's. Ladd's dad grills chicken a la Chuck while everyone is at church and Ree brings deviled bacon and eggs, pork lover's baked beans and country-style peach slab pie to feed a crowd.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Dinner Staycation
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making a Mexican food vacation for her husband, Nick, with all his favorites. She cooks up a decadent refried beans and rice bowl, roasted salmon tacos wrapped in chewy homemade flour tortillas.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Southern at Heart
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood is revisiting her most-comforting and crowd-pleasing Southern recipes, including Country Ham Biscuits and Scallion-Pimento Cheese, Pete's Catfish, Fried Green Tomatoes and her family's special recipe for Eboo's Wild Scuppernong Pie.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Best of Barefoot Comfort: Easy Dinners
programme.desc: Ina Garten is serving up her top picks for comforting, easy dinners, plus a new aperitif. There's Rigatoni with Sausage and Fennel, Roast Chicken Cobb Salad, Spring Green Risotto and a refreshing California Ice Tea.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Italian

programme.title: Southern Charm: Watch with Ashley and Kathryn: Ho, Ho, Ho
programme.desc: After five years of constant tension, Patricia finally extends an olive branch and invites Kathryn to her winter ball. As these two enemies make peace, the delicate truce between Craig and Naomie blows up when he brings a date to the ball.

programme.title: Southern Charm: Watch with Madison and Patricia: White Gloves Off
programme.desc: The Charleston socialites get ready for another grand event hosted by Miss Patricia, and battle lines are drawn when Austen learns that Shep and Craig's dates are the girls from his infamous threesome video.

programme.title: Below Deck: B*tch in Charge
programme.desc: Captain Lee worries that Chandler is mismanaging his deck team after hearing some unsettling news. Ross confronts Rhylee after she oversteps her boundaries. Meanwhile, Caroline feels left out vents her frustrations to Kate.

programme.title: Below Deck: Naked Smoothies
programme.desc: Rhylee and Chandler continue to be at odds. The crew welcome a group of social media obsessed Silicon Valley investors. Caroline wakes up with a mysterious foot injury and has difficulty pulling her weight, and Kate struggles with the guests.

programme.title: Below Deck: Get Better or Go Home
programme.desc: As Chandler’s decision making frustrates the deck crew, Rhylee and Ashton grow desperate for a change at bosun. The charter guests overcome their fears by swimming with some scary ocean predators.

programme.title: Below Deck: New Kids on the Dock
programme.desc: The crew welcomes aboard their largest group of charter guests yet, including two young children, posing new challenges for everyone. While Chef Adrian jumps through hoops to please all their preferences, Chandler tries to redeem himself.

programme.title: Below Deck: Flesh Wounds are not Five Star
programme.desc: Chandler is left at odds with Captain Lee and the entire Deck Team when an oversight leaves the charter guests stranded at an off-boat excursion without basic amenities.

programme.title: Below Deck: Insult to Injury
programme.desc: Captain Lee comes to a decision about restructuring the deck team, while Caroline is pushed to make a decision regarding her place. Ashton proves to be a ladies' man on a night out, while Rhylee ruffles some feathers with Adrian.

programme.title: Below Deck: Man Overboard
programme.desc: My Seanna struggles to pull off a successful Charter on the heels of two dramatic exits from crew members, Chandler and Caroline. Tensions rise as newly-appointed bosun, Ross, finds himself at odds with an easily-riled Rhylee.

programme.title: Below Deck: Let Them Eat Chicken!
programme.desc: The aftermath of Ashton's accident has the entire crew shaken up, especially Captain Lee. While the deck crew is on edge with a man down, Laura struggles to fall in line with her third stew role and her boss Kate.

programme.title: Below Deck: Check Yourself!
programme.desc: Adrian is confused by Laura's flirtatious advances after she crashes with Ashton in the crow's nest. Meanwhile, Rhylee gets fired up when Ross tells Tyler he'd be doing him a favour by hooking up with her. Laura and Kate have a screaming match.

programme.title: Below Deck: 'I Said I Got It!'
programme.desc: Kate deals with Laura's insubordination after being told to 'check' herself. Ross is at his wits end with Rhylee's attitude after she confronts him once again about feeling like the low man on the totem pole.

programme.title: Movie: Get Out
programme.desc: A young black man is invited to his white girlfriend's family estate. When he arrives, he notices that the staff of the house are all black, and something seems off. When one warns him to get out, he finds himself trapped by the dangerous family.

programme.title: Movie: Venom
programme.desc: While investigating a secret lab where the Life Foundation is performing sinister experiments on people, a reporter is exposed to an alien symbiote that bonds with him, granting him super-human abilities but also a lust for murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Movie: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family of four living in an isolated farmhouse must remain absolutely silent because of the deadly monsters that hunt using sound that live all around them, but with a new baby on the way that perpetual and safe silence may soon be shattered.

programme.title: Movie: The First Purge

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVI
programme.desc: Mr. Burns invites Homer and his friends to his big estate for a hunting tournament, but Homer and the gang learn they are the ones being hunted. The Simpsons adopt David, an artificial robot son, after Bart falls into a coma.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVIII
programme.desc: The fright fest begins in 'Mr. and Mrs. Simpson' as Homer and Marge leave for what appears to be an ordinary day. But Homer is living a double life as a secret agent, and he is assigned to eliminate Kent Brockman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIX
programme.desc: Homer kills off celebrities so their likenesses can be exploited free-of-charge. Transformer-like robots duke it out in Springfield. Lisa accompanies Milhouse to a pumpkin patch to await the appearance of the Grand Pumpkin, who finally appears.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXI
programme.desc: Marge, worried about the effects of excessively violent video games, encourages Bart and Milhouse to give wholesome, classic board games a shot. Then, Lisa likes a boy who happens to be a vampire.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIII
programme.desc: A Mayan Homer and Marge are witnesses to the prediction that 2012 will be the end of the world, the Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that terrorizes the city and Bart travels back in time to 1974.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIV
programme.desc: Homer rides around Springfield wreaking havoc as 'The Fat in The Hat' in a rhyming Dr. Seuss-ian tale. In 'Dead and Shoulders,' Bart is beheaded during a kite accident and his head is attached to Lisa's body.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXV
programme.desc: On the annual spooktacular Halloween special, Bart and Lisa are transported to a demon-filled alternate universe after Bart reads a set of Aramaic symbols he finds on the underside of his desk.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVI
programme.desc: In the annual frightfest Halloween episode, Sideshow Bob finally kills Bart, only to reanimate him. Homer wakes up with short-term memory loss, and Lisa, Bart and Milhouse get super powers from radiation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVII
programme.desc: Mr. Burns introduces a 'Hunger Games'-style contest in which Springfield's children must fight each other, and Lisa's imaginary best friend becomes jealous of Lisa's real best friends.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVIII

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIX

programme.desc: Mr. Burns is forced to hire a woman after violating labour laws. Homer soon begins to daydream about Mindy, the new employee, and he finds himself in a difficult situation when they go on a business trip together. Meanwhile, Bart gets branded as a nerd.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Viva Ned Flanders
programme.desc: Feeling as though life is passing him by, Ned takes a gambling vacation in Sin City.

programme.title: The Simpsons: It's a Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad Marge
programme.desc: A young woman temporarily moves in with the Simpsons when she is jilted at the altar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: The Simpson family is ordered to see a social worker after a monopoly game goes sour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer of Seville
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires Homer to sing the lead in his production of 'La Bohème.' Homer wows the crowd and escapes a mob of crazed fans with the help of a mysterious woman who seems a little too concerned with Homer's well being.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangerous Curves
programme.desc: When the Simpson family takes a road trip to a cabin in the woods, a series of flashbacks depict Homer and Marge's blissful courtship and their early, married years.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Labor Pains
programme.desc: Homer remembers his Lamaze skills when he's forced to deliver a baby in an elevator. When the mother names the child Homer Jr., he quickly develops a deep emotional bond with the kid. Lisa is recruited by the cheerleaders of the local pro football team.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles
programme.desc: Follow tigers, harpy eagles, chimpanzees, army ants and other predators as they rise to the challenge of hunting within the forest. The prize for succeeding at nature's great game of hide-and-seek is one worth winning.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Oklahoma Horror Story
programme.desc: Just before Thanksgiving in Oklahoma City, a husband and wife are at home when two masked gunmen allegedly ambush them and kill the husband. With few leads, police use ballistics, forensics and neighborhood gossip to solve this cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Bloody Mary's
programme.desc: Legend says Bloody Mary was a ruthless killer, whose soul could be summoned by chanting her name 3 times into a mirror. She has appeared in many forms throughout history reaping havoc on those unfortunate enough to cross her path.

programme.title: Redrum: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Chris Vaughn and his family are driving to a water park when their lives are tragically ended in a roadside shooting. Chris is wounded but survives. As investigators unravel the truth, they find that not everyone in this family was a happy camper.

programme.title: Redrum: A New Man
programme.desc: When a fire breaks out at the home of Ari and Denise Squire, firefighters respond to the scene and find the lifeless body of Ari. Across town, another man, Justin Newman, is reported missing, and his last known location flips this case on its head.

programme.title: Jodi Arias: An American Murder Mystery: Blood on the Wall
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2008, 30-year-old Travis Alexander is found brutally murdered in his shower. Travis's friends cast suspicion on his ex-girlfriend Jodi Arias.

programme.title: Jodi Arias: An American Murder Mystery: A Lover Scorned
programme.desc: Jodi Arias becomes a media sensation as her murder trial begins. As the proceedings unfold, her story changes dramatically, and nothing is as it once seemed.

programme.title: Jodi Arias: An American Murder Mystery: Sex, Lies, and Audiotape
programme.desc: As the trial continues, the defense presents shocking accusations against Travis Alexander. Watch Jodi take the stand and reveal the scandalous nature of her relationship with Travis, and the blockbuster conclusion to this salacious trial.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mothers Who Kill
programme.desc: These stories will shock you and make you wonder what would drive a woman to murder her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Deadly Women: No Mercy
programme.desc: Some women don't have a kind bone in their body. They take lives without a second thought. A mom sacrifices her son; a greedy book-keeper steals her way to murder and a teen takes her rebellion to shocking heights.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Obsession
programme.desc: These deadly women were consumed by obsessions that overtook their minds and their lives.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Granny Gets a Gun
programme.desc: A woman disapproves of her granddaughter's new boyfriend and plots to eliminate him.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Predator
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Friends to Foes

programme.desc: After losing her husband in a tragic accident, God-fearing Cindy McKay claims she's had to bend the law to pay off his illicit debts. But authorities soon realize she's a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: Documenting the life of the money-loving mafia man Joe Colombo, who campaigned against harassment of Italian-Americans in the 1970s.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: Documenting the life of the money-loving mafia man Joe Colombo, who campaigned against harassment of Italian-Americans in the 1970s.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Massino
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Alexander The Great's Spidermen
programme.desc: Alexander the Great confronts a rebel warlord in an impregnable mountain stronghold. He despatches 300 hand-picked warriors to scale the sheer rock face at night without being detected. It's a brutal test of climbing skill and raw courage.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries
programme.desc: Sir John Hawkwood, a pioneer of psychology and guerilla tactics, threw out the rulebook and won battles using his wits.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Emilia-Romagna
programme.desc: Andrew explores the region of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, and discovers ancient recipes and culinary classics including mortadella sausage, parmigiano reggiano, and tortellini in broth.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Oaxaca
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores regional specialties in Oaxaca, Mexico. From complex mole negro sauce over Mayan-era tamales and crispy tortilla with pork lard to egg bread dunked in hot chocolate, local tradition flavors each bite.

programme.desc: The gang suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend, is responsible for Stella's missing music box. Then, after watching zombie movies, Clyde and Lincoln assume an empty Loud house is the result of a zombie apocalypse.

programme.title: The Loud House: Jeers for Fears/ Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears./Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it – no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tricked!
programme.desc: For Halloween, Lincoln and Clyde have scoped out a fancy neighborhood to make their dreams of scoring full size candy bars a reality.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Scaredy Pants/ I Was a Teenage Gary
programme.desc: Bob is determined to scare everyone at the Halloween party; Bob becomes a snail.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Legend of Boo-Kini Bottom
programme.desc: It's Halloween in Bikini Bottom, and the Flying Dutchman is going to make sure everyone's scared, even SpongeBob.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: The Monster Who Came to Bikini Bottom /Welcome to Bikini Bottom Triangle
programme.desc: A monster terrorizes Bikini Bottom until Patrick befriends the huge creature. Then, SpongeBob and all the Bikini Bottom citizens disappear to an underwater resort.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: The Main Drain
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick search for a legendary drain on the ocean floor.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Life in a Day/ Sun Bleached
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to live a life of extreme danger. SpongeBob and Patrick become obsessed with tanning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Legends of Bikini Bottom: Trench Billies /Sponge-Cano
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick fall into a cavern where frightful Trench Billies keep them hostage. Next, Squidward's complaints trigger a volcanic eruption.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Curse of Bikini Bottom / Squidward in Clarinetland
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick disturb the Flying Dutchman's slumber and he turns them into ghosts.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Giant Squidward/ No Nose Knows
programme.desc: When Squidward gets spritzed with plant growth spray, he becomes monstrously huge. Patrick gets a nose.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Graveyard Shift/ Krusty Love
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab is now open 24 hours a day; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Scroll of the Demodragon
programme.desc: The Turtles believe they have defeated their old enemies, but they soon discover a new evil is rising.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Forgotten Swordsmen
programme.desc: Karai searches for the Kuro Kabuto, claiming to be the rightful heir to the Foot Clan, when she encounters an old rival.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Heart of Evil
programme.desc: Donnie's grudge against Don Vizioso threatens the Turtles' mission.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: End Times
programme.desc: The Turtles must defeat Kavaxas and prevent him from destroying the world.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Lone Rat and Cubs
programme.desc: When Splinter is first mutated, he must learn to survive the life of a mutant on the run while also protecting four baby mutant turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Curse of Savanti Romero
programme.desc: As the turtles get ready for Halloween, the city is invaded by strange monsters.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Crypt of Dracula
programme.desc: The turtles travel to Transylvania in order to stop Savanti Romero.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Frankenstein Experiment
programme.desc: After recruiting Frankenstein's monster, Savanti releases all of the creatures into the 21st century.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Theozilla/ Doggone It
programme.desc: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant. Later, when all the phones at school are missing, Alvin is blamed and he tries to clear his name.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sister Act/ Lil' T
programme.desc: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Room of One's Own/ Carts and Crafts
programme.desc: Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be. When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in contest to win a new bike.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Fool's Day Out/ Deja Vu
programme.desc: Timmy calls upon the April Fool for help, then wishes for a button to reset any day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Food Fight/ Please Don't Feed the Turners
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Back to the Norm/ Teeth for Two
programme.desc: Crocker and a genie share a mortal enemy; Jorgen tries to pull Timmy's tooth out.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dreamgoat/ The Same Game
programme.desc: Timmy feels sorry for the town's prize goat; everyone becomes the same.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Certifiable Super Sitter
programme.desc: Chloe meets Poof for the first time when he comes home from school on Spring Break. Cosmo and Wanda win a free French Dinner, so Chloe gets to babysit Poof and his friends. All goes well until Vicky shows up.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Date Expectations
programme.desc: A desperate Phoebe distracts Max from interfering with her class project by convincing him that a girl at school wants to go out with him. But after Max and his date realize they've been conned, they seek revenge.

programme.title: The Thundermans: He Got Game Night
programme.desc: Hank raises the stakes of family game night to a new high, and each member of the family will do whatever it takes to win the grand prize.

programme.title: Movie: Bunks
programme.desc: Troublemaking brothers accidentally unleash a curse on their camp that brings every campfire story to life.

programme.title: Scared Shrekless
programme.desc: When Halloween arrives, Shrek cannot wait to start celebrating his favourite holiday. Instead of the usual tricks and treats, Shrek challenges the fairy-tale characters to a storytelling contest in the haunted castle.

programme.title: Monsters vs. Aliens: Mutant Pumpkins From Outer Space
programme.desc: The Monsters are working as special ops and are dispatched to Modesto, Calif. An alien presence is detected, but when the team arrives, everything appears normal. When Halloween arrives, the jack-o-lanterns turn into aliens and try to take over the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Druselsteinoween
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Teachers Break Their Promises
programme.desc: When the students learn their much-anticipated class trip has been cancelled due to budgetary reasons, they devise a plan to fight back. Meanwhile, Uncle Will, Dusty, Chance, and Herman turn the mall upside down to prank a security guard.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Crushed
programme.desc: Chance flirts with a girl via text message, but after she flakes on him, he starts to believe that Bailey is pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Allowance Drama
programme.desc: Hilarity continues when Uncle Will and the kids bring a Loch Ness Pool Monster to life and stage a fake game show 'Date My Mom!' to prank a contestant with a series of gross and wild challenges.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Big Mother is Watching
programme.desc: The kids are outraged to learn that a tracking app has been installed on all of their phones.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Lord of the Jump Kings
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Stuck
programme.desc: When Herman tries to do a prank on his own, he ends up trapped inside the school's trophy case. Now it's up to the rest of the gang to get him out without getting caught.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Penultimate
programme.desc: Chance is worried after his phone pocket-likes a controversial post.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dear Me
programme.desc: The kids have to write letters to themselves 20 years in the future. Meanwhile, the gang pulls off hilarious pranks that include a wild skunk scaring a babysitter, and a target who believes a 3-D printer can print real food.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: School Clubbing
programme.desc: The gang signs up for after school clubs. Bailey joins the 'friends of animals club,' Dusty the 'TV club,' Herman the 'wrestling club' and Chance the 'journalism club.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Wedding
programme.desc: A team of young practical jokers pull off hilarious pranks in this hidden camera series.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Earth Gets Mooned
programme.desc: The gang takes part in an annual science competition at school, but they have trouble with their project partners.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: No Debating Bailey
programme.desc: When Drama Drew transfers schools, Ms. Spencer hunts for a replacement debater to face off against him at upcoming the regional championships.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fallout Shelter
programme.desc: After Dusty embarrasses everyone, Chance considers joining a rival prank show.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Lord of the Gummmy Worms
programme.desc: When the kids are stranded alone in the woods on a school camping trip, Bailey and Chance split into rival groups over their only supply of food: Gummy Worms.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Night Witch You'll Always Remember
programme.desc: When Bailey discovers that Clumsy Carl is going to ask her to an upcoming dance, she desperately searches for a different date and lands on Herman.

programme.title: The Owl House: The First Day
programme.desc: During Luz's first day of Magic School, curiosity gets the best of her, and she finds herself thrown into the Delinquent Track, where she's not allowed to learn magic.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Harvest Dinner/ Winner Winner

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Transgender Stipper Tricks
programme.desc: Shaniah is a stripper who seems to have some competition from her colleague Indya as it relates to her boyfriend Tae Tae. Kelli wants another child with her wife Laz, but Laz is cheating with the babysitter. Autumn is torn between two guys.

programme.title: Maury: Denied for Over 25 Years ... I'll Prove All 4 Kids Are Yours!
programme.desc: Stephanie isn't sure if Jonathan father her 26-year-old-son, but is certain he father her three daughters; Jonathan says a doctor told him he couldn't have boys. Tanea wants to know if Leanthony is her father; Leanthony says her mom cheated.

programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to come up with a way out of attending their friend's wedding.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Hidden Stash
programme.desc: Max joins Caroline on her visit to see her father in prison and he encourages them to purchase a particular keepsake at the Channing estate auction.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Howie Mandel.

programme.title: Black-ish: Jacked o' Lantern
programme.desc: Ever since he was a kid, Dre has loved Halloween. Now that he lives in one of those 'good candy neighborhoods,' kids come from all over the city to trick-or-treat, including Dre’s own nieces and nephews.

programme.title: Black-ish: Liberal Arts
programme.desc: Dre tearfully drops Zoey off to college for her two-day orientation, and she hits it off with a fellow incoming freshman, Miriam, after they ditch the campus tour. They are smitten upon meeting Aaron, who is running the Black Student Union booth.

programme.title: The 13 Scariest Movies of All Time
programme.desc: Dean Cain counts down the scariest movies of all time. With guests appearances by Elizabeth Stanton and Garrett Clayton, Jackie Fabulous, Darrin Butters and Ezra Weiss, Brandon Rogers, Katherine Murray and Noah Matthews, Ron Pearson, and Mikalah Gordon.

programme.title: World's Funniest Animals
programme.desc: We've got a pampered pooch, some spooked Sharpeis and swimming monkeys.

programme.title: World's Funniest Animals
programme.desc: Elizabeth Stanton and celebrities look at videos of animals doing funny things.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Bris
programme.desc: George gets a great parking spot at a hospital. Kramer thinks he has discovered a 'pig man.' Elaine and Jerry are nervous about their religious duties when they agree to become godparents.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Wizard
programme.desc: When Jerry buys an expensive organizer for his father, Morty refuses to use it to its full potential.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hi, Mr. Horned One
programme.desc: Charlie thinks he's in heaven when he starts dating Isabella, a wild, sexually uninhibited woman, until Alan points out that she's bringing him much closer to hell. He's unfazed by Alan's warning until Isabella threatens to put a curse on his manhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Ol' Mexican Spinach
programme.desc: Following a health scare on Halloween, Walden decides to reprioritize his life with Alan's help.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Stevie King
programme.desc: Adam’s love of Stephen King inspires him to try his hand at horror writing. After learning the monster in Adam’s story is based on Beverly, she forces Adam to stay in on Halloween and rewrite it.

programme.title: Mom: Puzzle Club and a Closet Party
programme.desc: Christy and Wendy help Jill clean out her closet, which turns out to be a bigger job than expected, and Bonnie, Marjorie and Tammy take up a new hobby.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Last Halloween Standing
programme.desc: Mike feels let down when his daughters aren't into celebrating Halloween with him the way they used to. He decides that his two-year-old grandson, Boyd, can be his perfect trick-or-treat partner.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Halloween

programme.title: Mom: Fun Girl Stuff and Eternal Salvation
programme.desc: Christy blames Bonnie when Roscoe announces he wants to go live with his father.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: DeWildt's Cheetahs
programme.desc: Jack goes to work at the Ann van Dyk Cheetah Center in South Africa where cheetah cubs are bred. Jack also encounters rare wild dogs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Elephant Camp
programme.desc: In Zimbabwe, Jack visits Elephant Camp - a home for orphaned elephants. He assists in radio collaring a female in preparation for her release into the wild. Then, Jack walks with an orphaned cheetah.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Braving Bocas
programme.desc: Panama's Bocas del Toro archipelago features a high concentration of bats. Jack ventures into a remote cave to get up close with bats and learn about the species.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Vines Come Down, Walls Go Up
programme.desc: The landscape crew reclaim the back yard from invasive vines and brambles, the contractor and master carpenter raise the gable wall for the family room addition, the front of the house is restored and Norm and Kevin demo the low kitchen ceiling.

programme.title: Jewels of the Natural World: Run Like the Wind
programme.desc: Two mother cheetahs, able to reach top speeds of nearly 70 miles per hour, are in a race to protect and feed their new litters of cubs. With predators closing in on the families, who will prevail on the Serengeti Plains of Africa?

programme.title: Tails of Valor: The Mane of the House
programme.desc: A miniature horse is the perfect service animal for one diabetic dog trainer. Then, a yellow lab gives his handler new hope the moment he walks into her life.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.
